script: TOKEN=$(/home/azureuser/yoomd-appcatalog-token.sh); for EID in eac70da8-72ea-46c9-ab86-1a805ef4e27c 775dd505-72a7-45d6-8ff2-bc2bb8d84666 28d694aa-a808-4169-8277-b11d6e6eff70; do echo "--- query externalId=$EID ---"; curl -s "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps?%24filter=externalId%20eq%20%27$EID%27" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" | jq '{count: (.value|length), entries: [.value[] | {id, externalId, displayName, distributionMethod}]}'; done; echo; echo '===== Also list any rosi-* in full catalog ====='; curl -s "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps?%24filter=distributionMethod%20eq%20%27organization%27" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" | jq '.value[] | select(.displayName | test("[Rr]osi")) | {id, externalId, displayName}'
